# Recent Changes

## 2026-06-02 Harness Update

The harness was updated for the upgraded codebase-harness parallel-safety
contract:

- `.ai/harness/hooks/task-workspace-guard.sh` deployed from the current
  path-derived, per-session template.
- `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh` deployed for atomic task ID
  allocation.
- `.ai/runtime/current-task/` is the active per-session sentinel directory.
- Legacy `.ai/runtime/current-task.json` remains in place as inert
  compatibility residue.
- Root wrappers and central structure docs now point agents at
  `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`.

## Active Drift To Watch

The upgraded validator is stricter about generated-wrapper body parity and
local path references. Marker-backed generated wrappers should be regenerated
from `.ai/harness/` sources after central edits.

Several older `.cursor/rules/*.mdc` files do not carry centralized source
markers. Treat those as legacy Cursor rules until explicitly migrated or
removed.
